active_dataset_audit.vessels_json_basis: dashboard/api/vessels.json is a stale local no-live-data static export.
active_dataset_audit.candidates_json_basis: dashboard/api/candidates.json is a stale local no-live-data static export.
active_dataset_audit.production_serving_rule: Worker APIs should read Supabase active_dataset_pointer and latest successful summary snapshots; local no_live_data JSON must not be treated as production data.

gate_block_reasons: No source rows were collected in this local/static run.
data_mode is no_live_data, so generated JSON intentionally contains zero vessels/candidates.
Supabase is not configured for this local run; production must use Worker/Supabase active_dataset_pointer instead of static fallback JSON.
recommended_fix: Do not use stale dashboard/api/*.json files as the production dataset when Supabase/Worker active dataset is available.
Keep Cloudflare upload skip rules for generated dashboard/api JSON assets.
Use /api/dashboard-summary.json and /api/vessels?group=all from the Worker to verify the live active dataset.
If source_rows_collected is zero in GitHub Actions, check required secrets and source collector logs before debugging scoring.
